reasoning: The current officially announced release date for GTA VI is November 19, 2026. It was delayed multiple times: first from Fall 2025 to May 26, 2026, and then to November 19, 2026 on November 6, 2025. Given that we are now in April 2026 and the official release targets November 2026, it is virtually impossible for the game to be fully released to the public by May 31, 2026. Major AAA titles do not randomly release 6 months ahead of their highly publicized launch schedules. There is also a 1% market probability. Therefore I assign the lowest possible probability bounds (0.02) to this event happening before the May 31, 2026 cutoff.
